$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for a harness-neutral skill source's metadata (Story 20.4-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; captures everything the Claude SKILL.md frontmatter and the Codex .codex-plugin manifest both need from one source.
title: NeutralSkillMetadata
description: Harness-agnostic metadata block (YAML frontmatter) of a neutral skill source. One source generates both the Claude SKILL.md and the Codex skill/manifest, so this captures the union of what each target requires without privileging either harness's spelling.

name.description: Kebab-case skill identifier, e.g. 'coverage'. Becomes the Claude skill/slash-command name and the Codex 'Use <name>' verb.

description.description: One-line trigger description. Feeds the Claude frontmatter 'description' and the Codex manifest 'description'.

short_description.description: Terse label for the Codex manifest 'metadata.short-description' / interface summary.

argument_hint.description: Argument usage hint, rendered into the Claude frontmatter 'argument-hint'.

allowed_tools.description: Tool allow-list, rendered into the Claude frontmatter 'allowed-tools'. Empty means no restriction is declared.

model_invocation.description: Harness-neutral form of Claude's 'disable-model-invocation'. 'auto' lets the model trigger the skill; 'disabled' restricts it to explicit invocation.

user_invocable.description: Whether the skill is exposed as a user-invocable slash command. Maps to the Claude frontmatter 'user-invocable'.

invocation_examples.description: Example invocations, e.g. 'coverage focus on lib/preflight.sh'. Rendered as Codex 'Use <name> ...' forms and as Claude usage examples.

harnesses.description: Target harnesses this skill is generated for. Defaults to both; Claude-only skills (e.g. fix-issue) list just ['claude'].
